steps.title: Identify the two functions shown
steps.content:
The graph displays two functions:
  • A V-shaped absolute value function with vertex at (3, 2)
  • A straight line (the linear function)

steps.title: Read the intersection point from the grid
steps.content: Following the curves on the coordinate grid, the straight line intersects the left branch of the absolute value function at the point where $x = 1$ and $y = 5$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
